# Documentation Issue

## Type of Documentation Issue
<!-- Mark the relevant option with an "x" -->
- [ ] Documentation is missing
- [ ] Documentation is incorrect/outdated
- [ ] Documentation is unclear/confusing
- [ ] Example code doesn't work
- [ ] API documentation needs improvement
- [ ] Installation/setup instructions need work
- [ ] Tutorial/guide request

## Location
<!-- Where is the documentation issue? -->
- [ ] README.md
- [ ] API Documentation (docs.rs)
- [ ] Code comments
- [ ] Examples
- [ ] Integration guide
- [ ] Callback server documentation
- [ ] Other: ___________

## Current Documentation
<!-- If applicable, quote the current documentation or provide a link -->

## Issue Description
<!-- Clearly describe what's wrong or what's missing -->

## Suggested Improvement
<!-- What would make the documentation better? -->

## Use Case
<!-- What were you trying to achieve when you encountered this issue? -->

## Target Audience
<!-- Who would benefit from this documentation improvement? -->
- [ ] Beginners to Rust
- [ ] Experienced Rust developers
- [ ] Beginners to Airtel Money API
- [ ] Experienced Airtel Money API users
- [ ] Integration developers
- [ ] DevOps/Infrastructure teams

## Additional Context
<!-- Add any other context about the documentation issue here -->

## Proposed Solution
<!-- If you have specific suggestions for how to fix this -->

## Related Links
<!-- Any relevant links to external documentation, API specs, etc. -->

## Willing to Help
<!-- Are you willing to help improve the documentation? -->
- [ ] Yes, I can write the documentation
- [ ] Yes, I can review documentation changes
- [ ] Yes, I can provide examples
- [ ] No, I cannot contribute
